creator: skreuzer@f2o.org
text:
WWW::Hotmail is a perl module used to connect to Hotmail, download, delete and send messages


# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail
#	/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-descr
#	/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-plist
#	/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/distinfo
#	/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/Makefile
#
echo c - /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail
mkdir -p /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-descr << 'END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-descr'
XWWW::Hotmail - Perl extension for connecting to Hotmail
X
XAuthor: David Davis, <xantus@cpan.org>
XWWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/WWW-Hotmail/
END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-descr
echo x - /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-plist << 'END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-plist'
X%%SITE_PERL%%/WWW/Hotmail.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Hotmail/.packlist
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW/Hotmail
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/WWW
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/WWW
END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/pkg-plist
echo x - /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/distinfo << 'END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/distinfo'
XMD5 (WWW-Hotmail-0.10.tar.gz) = a609a3924fc4c66b2cd81def90629e7f
XSHA256 (WWW-Hotmail-0.10.tar.gz) = 5b62e009143a6183577635fa919faf8c7cc8a9cca813e62f49f9ea60ae7dd9a6
XSIZE (WWW-Hotmail-0.10.tar.gz) = 6759
END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/distinfo
echo x - /usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	p5-WWW-GMail
X# Date created:		2006-07-20
X# Whom:			Steven Kreuzer <skreuzer@f2o.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	WWW-Hotmail
XPORTVERSION=	0.10
XCATEGORIES=	mail perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	WWW
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	skreuzer@f2o.org
XCOMMENT=	This module simplifies access to hotmail
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${SITE_PERL}/WWW/Mechanize.pm:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-WWW-Mechanize \
X		${SITE_PERL}/Mail/Audit.pm:${PORTSDIR}/mail/p5-Mail-Audit
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if ${PERL_LEVEL} < 500600
XIGNORE=	requires at least Perl 5.6 due to dependencies.  Please install lang/perl5.8 and try again
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/mail/p5-WWW-Hotmail/Makefile
exit
